name: aurora-filter-bar
title: Aurora Filter Bar
author: jmagar <https://github.com/jmagar>
description: Horizontal filter toolbar with search input, select dropdowns, and Aurora button actions.
docs:
Aurora component that expects `aurora-tokens` to be installed first.

Default install target: `@ui/aurora/filter-bar.tsx`.

Registry dependencies: `aurora-tokens`, `aurora-button`, `aurora-input`, `aurora-select`.
